items.summary: The FireSat program can spot wildfires that other satellites miss.

items.headline: TikTok is testing an AI likeness detection tool
items.summary: TikTok is starting to test an opt-in tool that scans for AI likenesses and lets creators report them to the company, as spotted by social media consultant Matt Navarra. The tool is initially being tested with "some" US creators, TikTok US…

items.headline: Apple’s plot to crush OpenAI

items.headline: San Francisco orders Apple, Google to remove nudify apps from app stores
items.summary: Official estimates Google and Apple likely made millions in nudify app fees.

items.headline: Patreon stops asking AI bots not to scrape — and starts blocking them
items.summary: Patreon is strengthening its defenses against AI scraping by working with Cloudflare to block bots that train AI models on creators’ content without permission. The move marks a shift away from relying on websites using robots.txt alone to…

items.headline: A scorecard for the AI age
items.summary: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.
